commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Therefore say unto them, Thus says the Lord GOD; You eat with the blood, and lift up your eyes toward your idols, and shed blood: and shall you possess the land. Grabe marks to ver. , Thus saith, as wanting in the Septuagint, though not in the Alexandrian copy. Jerome reckons eight verses or lines omitted. (Haydock) The Complutensian and Theodoret read them with some variations. It must be carefully extracted, Genesis ix. , and Leviticus vii. Uncleannesses; idols, in which you trust.
